custody_adjustment.note: Md. Fam. Law 12-204(m): shared physical custody (both parents 92+ overnights/year) triggers a cross-formula (basic obligation x1.5, cross-multiplied by each parent's income share and the OTHER parent's time share) instead of simple proration. In the narrow 92-109 overnight band, an additional graduated bonus (2%-10%, higher for fewer nights in that band) is added to the paying parent's theoretical amount. The result is capped at the sole-custody amount if that would be lower.

deviation_note: Above $30,000/month combined adjusted actual income, Maryland's schedule has no further value -- courts use discretion in setting support (Md. Fam. Law 12-204(d)) rather than an automatic formula. This calculator approximates the shared-custody formula's add-on cost split (each parent's own childcare/health costs credited separately) as a single combined figure, since it collects one childcare/health-insurance amount rather than a separate figure per parent.
